mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS STRT_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.TOT_VAC_CNT) AS TOT_VAC_CNT, TO_CHAR(A.ADD_VAC) AS ADD_VAC, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_YEAR_VAC) AS LAST_YEAR_VAC, TO_CHAR(A.TOT_VAC_CNT + A.ADD_VAC + A.LAST_YEAR_VAC) AS TOTAL, TO_CHAR(AR_USE_VACATION( TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM')) AS USE_VAC, TO_CHAR(AR_USE_VACATION( TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM')) AS AFFIRM_USE_VAC, TO_CHAR(A.TOT_VAC_CNT + A.ADD_VAC + A.LAST_YEAR_VAC - AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') - AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') - A.USE_VAC_CNT) AS REMAIN_VAC FROM AR_VAC_EMP A WHERE A.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.ACTIVITY = 1 AND TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE, 'YYYY') = #{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.STRT_DATE

SELECT A.APPLY_NO, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS LEAVE_FROM_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_FROM_TIME_ONLY, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS LEAVE_TO_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_TO_TIME_ONLY, TO_CHAR(A.APPLY_LENGTH) AS APPLY_LENGTH, A.AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(A.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, A.CONFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(A.CONFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS CONFIRM_FLAG_NAME FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB A WHERE A.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.ACTIVITY = 1 AND A.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE = '26' AND TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY') = #{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME
